---
name: Issue report
about: Something looks wrong, behaves oddly, or doesn’t match expectations
title: "[Issue]: "
labels: issue
assignees: scherrer-txt

---

## What’s wrong
A clear and concise description of the issue. Screenshots help a lot for visual issues.

## What I was expecting instead
Describe what you expected to happen, or what you were aiming for.

## How to reproduce (if applicable)
Minimal steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Lorem
2. Ipsum
3. Dolor

If you can’t reproduce it reliably, say so. One-off or setup-specific issues are still useful data.

## Environment
- OS (and version):
- Shell (bash, zsh, fish, etc.):
- Terminal emulator:
- Font(s) in use:
- Relevant plugins or extensions:
- Commit hash / version of this repo:

## Related configuration
List any configs, themes, or plugins that might interact with this one.
Links or snippets are better than descriptions.

## Screenshots / output
For visual issues, include screenshots.
For errors, paste output using code blocks (```), not screenshots of text.

## Additional context
Add any other context that might help explain or reproduce the issue.

---

### Checklist
- [ ] I searched existing issues
- [ ] I’m using the latest version of this repo
- [ ] I included screenshots or output where relevant
- [ ] I understand this repo is opinionated and may not match every setup
